servers.name: Weather MCP
servers.description: Real weather data from NOAA and Open-Meteo. 6 tools, no API key required.

servers.name: Open-Meteo (Remote HTTP)
servers.description: Public hosted Open-Meteo MCP instance over Streamable HTTP - demonstrates the remote transport.

servers.name: Amadeus Flights MCP
servers.description: Flight search via the Amadeus test API. Requires AMADEUS_CLIENT_ID and AMADEUS_CLIENT_SECRET in backend/.env (free at developers.amadeus.com). Phase 4.
